top_signals.title: US-Iran Strikes Ratchet Up Tensions as Tehran Says Hormuz Shut
top_signals.summary: US forces struck Iran for a third time in a week, prompting retaliatory attacks on at least five Arab nations as Tehran declared the Strait of Hormuz closed “until further notice.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China cracks down on top ratings for corporate bonds
top_signals.summary: Regulators pressure agencies to limit triple-A designations for higher-interest borrowers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
